title: Explosive Pitcher Pods
description: The goal is to blow stuff up.
body:
This mod gives use to the pitcher pod, and makes for a somewhat interesting weapon. When you hit the head of the pitcher plant plant it will fly of and blow up the first thing it comes into contact with. They can also be thrown.
If you want to break a pitcher plant safely, you'll either need to break it from the bottom or harvest it with shears. Otherwise you'll go boom.
